title: Household appliance
abstract: A household appliance (1) comprising a network card (2) enabling connection to a wireless local area network and capable of communicating with a mobile device (C) connected to a local area network, and a control card (3) in communication with the network card (2), managing functions and programs.
claims: Claims ( 9 ) A household appliance (1) comprising a network card (2) enabling connection to a wireless local area network and capable of communicating with a mobile device (C) connected to a local area network, and a control card (3) in communication with the network card (2), managing functions and programs, characterized by the control unit (4) enabling reducing the strength of the internet broadcast transmitted from the network card (2) during establishing connection to the local area network. A household appliance (1) according to claim 1, characterized by the control unit (4) enabling the network card (2) to make an unencrypted internet broadcast during establishing connection to the mobile device (C). A household appliance (1) according to claim 1 or 2, characterized by the control unit (4) enabling the network card (2) to connect to the local area network using the security information coming from the mobile device (C). A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the control unit (4) enabling reducing the strength of the internet broadcast transmitted from the network card (2) upon request of connection sent by means of the mobile device (C). A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the control unit (4) in which a previously connected mobile device (C) is identified, enabling the network card (2) to not reduce the strength of the internet broadcast during establishing connection with the same mobile device (C) again. A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims which is a cooler. A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims which is a cooker. A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims which is a washer. A household appliance (1) according to any one of the preceding claims which is a dryer.
